sentences.arabic: تَسْتَخْدِمُ مُدُنٌ عَرَبِيَّةٌ كَثِيرَةٌ التِّقْنِيَّةَ الْحَدِيثَةَ لِبِنَاءِ مُدُنٍ ذَكِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi arapski gradovi koriste modernu tehnologiju za izgradnju pametnih gradova.
sentences.translationEn: Many Arab cities use modern technology to build smart cities.

sentences.arabic: يَبْتَكِرُ الشَّبَابُ مَشَارِيعَ إِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةً مُبْدِعَةً فِي مَجَالَاتٍ مُخْتَلِفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Mladi ljudi kreiraju kreativne elektronske projekte u različitim oblastima.
sentences.translationEn: Young people are creating creative electronic projects in different fields.

sentences.arabic: تَدْعَمُ الْحُكُومَاتُ التَّحَوُّلَ الرَّقْمِيَّ لِتَحْسِينِ الْخِدْمَاتِ لِلْمُوَاطِنِينَ.
sentences.translation: Vlade podržavaju digitalnu transformaciju kako bi poboljšale usluge za građane.
sentences.translationEn: Governments support digital transformation to improve services for citizens.
